languages.text: "Как зовутся сыны, рожденные от крови самого Императора?"
"By what name are the children born from the blood of the Emperor Himself known?"
languages.original_text: "Как зовутся сыны, рожденные от крови самого Императора?"

traits.locale_text: "What is the name of the children born from the blood of the Emperor Himself?"
"What is the name of the children born from the blood of the Emperor Himself?"
"By what name are the children born from the blood of the Emperor Himself known?"
"By what name are the children born from the blood of the Emperor Himself known?"
"By what name are the children born from the blood of the Emperor Himself known?"

languages.text: “由帝皇的血脉诞生的子嗣，他们被称为什么？”
languages.original_text: "By what name are the children born from the blood of the Emperor Himself known?"

traits.locale_text: “由帝皇的血脉诞生的子嗣，他们被称为什么？”

languages.text: 「皇帝ご自身の血から生まれた子らは、何という名で知られている？」
languages.original_text: "By what name are the children born from the blood of the Emperor Himself known?"

traits.locale_text: 「皇帝ご自身の血から生まれた子らは、何という名で知られている？」

languages.text: «¿Con qué nombre se conoce a los hijos nacidos de la sangre del mismísimo Emperador?».
languages.original_text: "By what name are the children born from the blood of the Emperor Himself known?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Con qué nombre se conoce a los hijos nacidos de la sangre del mismísimo Emperador?».

languages.text: "Doğrudan İmparator'un kanından olan çocuklar hangi isimle bilinir?"
languages.original_text: "By what name are the children born from the blood of the Emperor Himself known?"

traits.locale_text: "Doğrudan İmparator'un kanından olan çocuklar hangi isimle bilinir?"

languages.text: « Quel nom portent les enfants nés de l'Empereur en personne ? »
languages.original_text: "By what name are the children born from the blood of the Emperor Himself known?"

traits.locale_text: « Quel nom portent les enfants nés de l'Empereur en personne ? »

languages.text: "Unter welchem Namen sind die Kinder bekannt, die aus dem Blut des Imperators selbst geboren werden?"
languages.original_text: "By what name are the children born from the blood of the Emperor Himself known?"

traits.locale_text: "Unter welchem Namen sind die Kinder bekannt, die aus dem Blut des Imperators selbst geboren werden?"
